required.purpose: Spec-driven sanitization rules used by pre_build and post_build.
Champion reference vector database used by entity_server.
Champion image assets used to resolve entity reference images.
Local SAM3 checkout imported directly by knowledge_extraction/entity_server.py.

recommended.purpose: Queue input directory used by knowledge_pipeline.run_full_queue.
Optional video URL registry used for answer post-processing.

notes: Model weights downloaded from Hugging Face are not committed to the repo by default.
The queue runner can exist without input videos, but actual end-to-end processing requires at least one video under downloads/queue.
